meaning: n.缺乏,久缺 adj.未成年的,未到法定年龄的
examples: However, persons who are underage in their home state can get married in another state and then return to the home state legally married.
Of course, underage college students never play online poker.
Mr Berlusconi is being tried separately on charges of paying for underage sex with Ms El-Mahroug.
The community coalition has done great work in Newtown to reduce underage drinking and substance use.
